steps.t: Speak with Gifemund ahead of you. The time has come to re-capture the fountain area, but you will need Gifemund's aid.
Herubrand has arrived at the fountain. Herubrand wishes to speak with you about the plan to retake the mead hall.
Herubrand is standing outside the mead hall door. Herubrand wishes to speak with you after defeating Arnwi.
Enter the mead hall with the others. The battle for Woodhurst has progressed into the mead hall.
Herubrand is within the door of the mead hall. Herubrand wishes to give directions on how the group will approach the coming battle.
Herubrand waits to speak with you before approaching those waiting for you at the throne of the mead hall.
Herubrand is near the throne in the mead hall. Herubrand would like to thank you for your part in aiding their victory.
